segments.text: There's considerable startup, so you'd have to release shield to parry
segments.original_text: 結構遅れてねジャスガーするためにはガード解除しなきゃいけないので

segments.text: Against that, they're coming in with spaced side B
segments.original_text: それに対してスカシ横Bで刺していきましたね

segments.text: Corrin's side B is a really interesting tool though, right?
segments.original_text: カムイ横Bは面白いパーツですよね

segments.text: Yeah, it definitely works as a spacing option too
segments.original_text: そうですねやはりスカシの選択肢にもなりますし
刺し込みの選択肢にもなるといった

segments.text: There are tons of practical situations
segments.original_text: 使いやすい展開が多い

full_text: There's considerable startup, so you'd have to release shield to parry Against that, they're coming in with spaced side B Corrin's side B is a really interesting tool though, right? Yeah, it definitely works as a spacing option too And as an approach option There are tons of practical situations And then this one... Well...
